content.en:
Subsequently, Ye Tian identified it, and then he knew the origin of this spear.

【Red Lin Ancient Tree】

Ye Tian's Eternal Divine Appreciation Realm could only identify this one name, and other information could not be identified.

After all, the Eternal Appreciation Divine Realm is just an Eternal Primordial Treasure, and naturally it can't identify things that are too advanced.

But what is certain is that the Chilin Ancient Tree is very extraordinary, after all, it can be used to make such a powerful weapon out of its wood, which is definitely above the Eternal Demon Pillar.

"The Chilin Ancient Tree should be in the depths of the Abyss of Despair, and after its strength is strong, it must be captured!"

Ye Tian muttered.

However, he didn't have the strength to capture the Chilin Ancient Tree now, so he had to improve his strength, and he had to cultivate the Spirit of the Xuan Star Realm Snake Realm.

Then, his strength will skyrocket, and it is not without hope to kill~ into the depths of the abyss of despair.

"For the time being, I can't enter the abyss of despair again, otherwise I will enter the abyss of despair again and again without being flowered by the demon seed, those Eternal Realm God Realm demon seeds will definitely suspect that once they kill my copy body and nothing happens to them, they will suspect that I have a perfect level-Eternal Dao Seed. "

Ye Tian didn't want to expose his perfect-level Eternal Dao Seed secret, even if it was known by the Demon Seed, it wouldn't work.

Therefore, in the following years, Ye Tian mainly refined the Eternal Dao Species, raised the current Eternal Dao Species to the limit, and then cultivated the Xuan Star Realm Snake.

And just like that, the long years passed.

At the same time, Ye Tian was also inquiring about the news of the Eternal Demon Pillar.

Originally, the No. 1 Demon Seed Abyss of the Myriad Gods Alliance had the Eternal Demon Pillar, and there may be Eternal Demon Pillars in other places.

After investigation, Ye Tian discovered that the Lone Star Realm Alliance once had an Eternal Demon Pillar, but it was snatched away by an Eternal Demon Pillar of the Eternal Realm God Realm, and even severely damaged several Eternal Realm God Realms.

"There are definitely quite a few Eternal Demon Pillars, but many times they have been snatched away by the Demon Seed of the Eternal Realm God Realm!" Ye Tian muttered.

These Eternal Realm Demon Seeds, refining the Eternal Demon Pillar is much easier than him, so once he occupies the Eternal Demon Pillar and stays for a few more years, he will definitely be able to snatch it away, and the Eternal Realm God Realm will most likely not be able to intercept it.

Therefore, many of the exposed Eternal Pillars were snatched away, and as for the Eternal Pillars that were not snatched away, almost all of them would block the news, and it would be difficult to pass it on at all.

After all, no one wants the news of the Eternal Demon Pillar in their Eternal Realm to spread and attract powerful Demon Seeds.

At the beginning, the Eternal Demon Pillar of the Ten Thousand Gods Kingdom Alliance was not spread, so those demon seeds of the Eternal Realm God Realm were not attracted.

Otherwise, this Eternal Demon Pillar would not be cheap for Ye Tian.

"Those Eternal Realm Divine Realms will not reveal the news of the Eternal Demon Pillar, if I keep inquiring, maybe the Realm Court will suspect that I have colluded with the Demon Seed and have something to do with the Demon Seed. Ye Tian muttered.

So, he was going to send a copy body to some of the Eternal Kingdom Alliances to explore the abyss of those demon seeds and see if there were any Eternal Pillars there.

If you find one, that's fine!

......

The years passed.

Ye Tian's copied body traveled to the Eternal Realm Alliance to explore the abyss of demon seeds.

Of course.

Many of the Demon Seed Abysses of the Eternal Realm Alliance have to be allowed to enter, Ye Tian's identity is unknown, so naturally there is no way to enter, but he will copy other Eternal Dao Realms and pretend to be those Eternal Dao Realms to enter.

In this way, he explored the abyss of the demon seed of the Eternal Kingdom Alliance.

However, none of these demon seed abysses have an Eternal Demon Pillar, and they are disappointed again and again.

However, he did not give up, and he searched again and again, and he firmly believed that he could find it.

Unconsciously, hundreds of millions of solstice years have passed.

this day.

Ye Tian came to an Eternal Realm Alliance called the Haiyan Kingdom Alliance, this Eternal Realm Alliance only has one Eternal Realm God Realm, six half-step Eternal Realm God Realms, and the strength is about the same as the original Ten Thousand Gods Kingdom Alliance, a little bit stronger.

After Ye Tian sneaked here, he secretly sneaked into the abyss of demon seeds.

He had no interest in the Demon Seed Abyss here at first, but when he was exploring one of the Eternal Demon Seed Abysses, he sensed the breath of the Eternal Demon Pillar, and a half-step Demon Seed of the Eternal Realm Divine Realm stayed by the Eternal Demon Pillar.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian made a move against him, and even if the other party could mobilize the power of the Eternal Demon Pillar, he was killed in a short period of time.

In this way, even if the Eternal Realm God Realm of the Sea Rock Realm Alliance came to investigate, he would not be able to find clues, and the other party would definitely not dare to investigate deeply.

In this way, in the following years, Ye Tian refined the Eternal Demon Pillar here, and did not hesitate to sacrifice a replica body and consume the Eternal Dao Seed to forcibly refine it, so that he could refine this Eternal Demon Pillar in a short period of time.

Before you know it, a long time has passed.

this day.

Ye Tian was able to control the Eternal Demon Pillar.

Airplanes!

The huge Eternal Demon Pillar continued to shrink and fell into Ye Tian's hands, becoming an Eternal Demon Pillar rod in his hand.

"It's time to go back!"

Ye Tian left here.

One day in the future, that Eternal Realm God Realm discovers that the Eternal Demon Pillar is gone, and I don't know whether to rejoice or panic.

......

After some time, Ye Tian returned from the Haiyan Realm Alliance to the Endless Realm Alliance.

However.

Ye Tian gave the Eternal Demon Pillar to his wife Xiao Yue.

"Yue'er, this is the Eternal Demon Pillar, you take it to refine it to improve your Eternal Dao Seed. "

Ye Tian said.

"Eternal Demon Pillar, you can use it yourself, the human race now depends on you, it doesn't matter whether I cultivate or not. Xiao Yue refused.

However.

Ye Tian took out another Eternal Demon Pillar, "I already have an Eternal Demon Pillar, this is another Eternal Demon Pillar that I just discovered, so it won't affect my cultivation." "

"The Second Eternal Pillar!"

Xiao Yue was surprised, and immediately proposed to give this Eternal Demon Pillar to her son or daughter.

However, Ye Tian still insisted on using it for Xiao Yue.

In the past, he often gave good things to his son, but this time he chose to give them to his wife, and when he found good things in the future, he would give them to his son and daughter.

At Ye Tian's insistence, Xiao Yue still took this Eternal Demon Pillar.

But even so, it would take a long time for Xiao Yue to completely refine the Eternal Demon Pillar.

And just like that, another long time passed.

Unconsciously, Ye Tian's Eternal Dao Seed has gradually been promoted to the current limit person.
